title: Dynamic values mondaydoc on mobile are empty
excerpt: I generate workdoc using dynamic values. On the destop version, it works fine,  but on my phone (android) I can’t see the values. When it will be fixed?

posts.author: xthibaud (Xavier Thibaud)
posts.cookedHtml: I generate workdoc using dynamic values. On the destop version, it works fine, but on my phone (android) I can’t see the values. When it will be fixed?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Xavier! In order to check if this expected behavior or a known limitation for the mobile app, could you share a screenshot of what you’re seeing on your desktop versus on your mobile app?

Also, feel free to check in with our support team here to discuss in case it is a bug!
